title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
